Class TilesDecorationFilter

java.lang.Object
org.apache.tiles.web.util.TilesDecorationFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
javax.servlet.Filter
public class TilesDecorationFilter extends Object implements javax.servlet.Filter
Decoration Filter. Intercepts all requests and decorates them with the configured definition.

For example, given the following config:

<filter> <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>filter-name&gt;Tiles Decoration Filter<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/filter-name&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>filter-class&gt;org.apache.tiles.web.TilesDecorationFilter<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/filter-class&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>init-param&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>param-name&gt;definition<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/param-name&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>param-value&gt;test.definition<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/param-value&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/init-param&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>init-param&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>param-name&gt;attribute-name<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/param-name&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>param-value&gt;body<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/param-value&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/init-param&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>init-param&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>param-name&gt;prevent-token<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/param-name&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>param-value&gt;layout<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/param-value&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/init-param&gt; </filter> <p/> <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>filter-mapping&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>filter-name&gt;Tiles Decoration Filter<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/filter-name&gt; <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>url-pattern&gt;/testdecorationfilter.jsp<span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/url-pattern&gt; <dispatcher>REQUEST</dispatcher> <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>/filter-mapping&gt; The filter will intercept all requests to the indicated url pattern store the initial request path as the "body" attribute and then render the "test.definition" definition. The filter will only redecorate those requests which do not contain the request attribute associated with the prevent token "layout".
